description: A graphic with a darkened booking-style portrait of a young man at the top and large white text reading 'NOT A "VIRGINIA DAD"'. Below are three torn-paper news-headline clippings: a Fox 5 headline about a father charged with murder of a 3-month-old in Fairfax County, an 'Annandale Today' headline about a man charged with killing a 3-month-old daughter, and a WUSA9 headline about a Virginia dad charged after a medical examiner cited blunt force trauma.
notable_text: NOT A VIRGINIA DAD; Father charged with murder in death of 3-month-old daughter in Fairfax County; FOX 5; Annandale Today; WUSA9
